goal: Draft a complete game planning document for 3-tier card progression (1-star/2-star/3-star), including unlock logic, balance boundaries, UX rules, and rollout plan.
constraints: This task is documentation-only; do not modify gameplay/runtime code.
Use current repository facts as baseline and clearly separate current state from proposed design.
Plan must be executable and include acceptance criteria and risk controls.
deliverables: A markdown planning document for card tiering strategy and implementation guidance.
